name: Bavarian Style Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium-sized mixing bowl, combine the chili sauce, cranberry sauce, sauerkraut, water, and brown sugar. Mix well.
2. Pour the mixture into a slow cooker.
3. Add the frozen meatballs to the slow cooker.
4. Stir everything together.
5. Cook, covered, at a medium temperature for 4 hours, stirring occasionally to coat the meatballs evenly.
